name: Sales by country
description: Aggregate sales by customer country within a date range
sql_template: SELECT c.country, SUM(s.amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS tx_count FROM sales_daily s JOIN customers_master c ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE s.sale_date BETWEEN DATE($start_date) AND DATE($end_date) GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY total_amount DESC

name: Events per day
description: Count events per day filtered by event name
sql_template: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', event_ts) AS day, COUNT(*) AS total_events FROM events_stream WHERE event_name = $event_name GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

name: Customer 360 summary
description: Join customer profile with purchase and event counts
sql_template: SELECT c.customer_id, c.email, COALESCE(SUM(s.amount), 0) AS lifetime_value, COUNT(DISTINCT e.event_id) AS event_count FROM customers_master c LEFT JOIN sales_daily s ON s.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN events_stream e ON e.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.customer_id = $customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.email
